# PHIL.014 ? Eudaimonism

**Type:** PHILOSOPHY
**Category:** ancient_greek_roman
**Subcategory:** eudaimonism
**Domain:** ANCIENT_GREEK_ROMAN
**Status:** active

## Core Principles
Human flourishing as highest good; virtue and reason as path to happiness; excellent functioning; living well

## Application
Aim for holistic flourishing not just pleasure; develop virtues; exercise reason excellently; achieve full human potential

## Key Values
- Flourishing
- Virtue
- Excellent function
- Well-being

philosophy, ancient-greek-roman, eudaimonism
